samples.xml_description:
<module id="div_16bit">
    <description>Design a simplified radix-2 divider on 8-bit numbers.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst">Reset signal.</input>
        <input id="sign">Sign bit (1 for signed).</input>
        <input id="dividend" width_description="[7:0]">Dividend.</input>
        <input id="divisor" width_description="[7:0]">Divisor.</input>
        <input id="opn_valid">Valid operation input.</input>
        <input id="res_ready">Ready for result input.</input>
        <output id="res_valid">Result valid output.</output>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">Result output.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <param id="IDLE">0</param>
        <param id="START">1</param>
        <param id="SUB">2</param>
        <param id="UPDATE">3</param>
        <param id="DONE">4</param>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
    <para>Implement the divider using a sequential algorithm.</para>
    <para>Initialize the shift register with the dividend.</para>
    <para>Iteratively subtract the divisor from the shift register.</para>
    <para>Update the shift register with the result.</para>
    <para>Repeat until the divisor is 0.</para>
    <para>Set the result output.</para>
    </implementation>
</module>
